channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Protesters stabbed at London rally against war on Iran
item.description: Videos show multiple individuals with what appear to be knife wounds, who were taking part in a protest in London.

item.title: Israel kills journalist and wounds another in south Lebanon targeted attack
item.description: Israel has killed journalist Amal Khalil and injured Zeinab Faraj in a ‘double-tap’ attack in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Iran releases video of IRGC seizing ship in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran’s revolutionary guard has released a video said to show its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Israel kills Lebanese journalist; Tehran-US talks stalled
item.description: Israeli attacks on Lebanon killed at least five people on Wednesday, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil.

item.title: Israeli forces fire tear gas at funeral of Palestinians killed by settlers
item.description: Israeli forces raided the funeral of two Palestinians killed by settlers at a school in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: Iran blames Trump’s blockade for diplomatic impasse as fragile truce holds
item.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says US and Israel will not achieve their goals 'through bullying'.

item.title: China weathered Trump's tariffs - but the Iran war is taking a toll
item.description: The Middle East conflict is putting pressure on factory orders, costs and jobs in China's export-driven economy.

item.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
item.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

item.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
item.description: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.

item.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
item.description: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.
